What we do

Roofing services for Northern Colorado homes

From a small leak to a full tear-off, we handle the whole roof system. Pick what you need and we’ll come out and take a look for free.

Roof replacement

Full tear-off and new installs built to last decades. Shingle, metal, and flat systems, installed clean and to code.

Get a free estimate →

Roof repairs

Leaks, missing shingles, flashing, and wind damage fixed fast, often the same week you call.

Book a repair →

Re-roofs

Smart overlay options when a full replacement is not needed quite yet. We’ll tell you honestly which one you need.

Ask about a re-roof →

Storm & hail damage

Wind and hail inspections with insurance-claim help from the first call to the final invoice.

Storm response →

Free inspections

A thorough on-roof assessment with honest photos and a clear written estimate. No pressure and no obligation.

Schedule an inspection →

Gutters & ventilation

Gutters, fascia, soffit, and attic ventilation to keep the whole roof system dry and healthy.

Get a quote →

Why Mike & Sons

The roofers your neighbors actually recommend

We are a family that has been on Northern Colorado roofs for three generations. You get the owner’s phone number, straight answers, and work we are proud to put our name on.

  • The price we quote is the price you payNo surprise change orders halfway through the job.
  • Honest photo inspectionsWe show you what is actually happening on your roof before you spend a dollar.
  • We handle the insurance adjusterStorm and hail claims documented and managed from first call to final invoice.
  • Backed by warrantyWorkmanship warranty plus the manufacturer warranty on materials.

15

years of clean, on-time roofs

Across Fort Collins, Loveland, Windsor, Greeley, and the towns in between, we have built a reputation the slow way: one honest job at a time.

Start with a free inspection

How it works

Getting your roof handled is simple

1

Call or request a quote

Tell us what is going on. Call (970) 780-2900 or fill out the form and we’ll set a time.

2

Free on-roof inspection

We get on the roof, take honest photos, and send a clear written estimate.

3

We do the work

We schedule fast, show up on time, protect your property, and clean up every nail.

4

Final walkthrough

We walk the finished roof with you and back it with our workmanship warranty.

Storm & hail

Wind or hail hit your roof? We respond fast.

Colorado storms do not wait, and neither do we. We tarp active leaks quickly, document the damage your insurance needs, and handle the adjuster so you do not have to fight the claim alone.

  • Emergency leak tarping to stop the damage
  • Full photo documentation for your claim
  • We work directly with your adjuster
  • Most storm replacements: you pay only your deductible
24 hrs

typical response after a storm

Call now: (970) 780-2900

Active leak right now? Call us first, fill out the form second.

Straight talk on price

What roofing costs in Northern Colorado

Every roof is different, but here is an honest starting range so you can plan. Your free inspection gives you an exact written number.

Roof repair

$350–$1,800

Leaks, flashing, wind damage, missing shingles.

Re-roof / overlay

$4,500–$9,000

When the deck is sound and an overlay makes sense.

Shingle replacement

$9,000–$18,000

Full tear-off and new architectural shingle roof.

Metal / standing seam

$18,000–$40,000

Premium metal systems built for Colorado weather.

Ranges are estimates and vary by size, pitch, and material. Storm and hail damage is often covered by insurance, where you typically pay only your deductible.

Financing

A new roof that fits your budget

A roof is a big purchase, and it should not have to wait for a storm to force the decision. Ask about flexible financing with monthly payment options so you can protect your home now and pay over time.

Approval is quick, and we will walk you through the monthly options during your free estimate.

Ask about financing

Our story

Three generations on the roof

Mike & Sons Roofing is exactly what the name says: a family business. What started with one roofer and a ladder is now a crew that treats every home like it belongs to a neighbor, because in Northern Colorado, it usually does.

We do not chase volume or upsell roofs people do not need. We get on the roof, tell you the truth, and do the job right. That is the whole business.

Good to know before you call

Roofing questions, answered

Always. We come out, get on the roof, and give you honest photos with a clear written estimate. No pressure and no sales call.

Most asphalt shingle replacements in Northern Colorado run between $9,000 and $18,000 depending on size, pitch, and material, with repairs from $350 to $1,800. Metal systems run higher. Your free inspection gives you an exact written number.

Yes. We document storm and hail damage thoroughly and work directly with your adjuster from inspection through final invoice. For approved claims you typically pay only your deductible.

Most repairs are handled the same week. Full replacements are typically scheduled within a couple of weeks, weather permitting. Storm emergencies get a same-day response when we can.

A quality asphalt shingle roof lasts around 20 to 30 years here, though hail can shorten that. Metal roofs can last 40 years or more. We will tell you honestly how much life your current roof has left.

Northern Colorado: Fort Collins, Loveland, Windsor, Greeley, and surrounding communities across Larimer and Weld counties. If you are nearby, give us a call.
